title: NexGen 6 x 15ml Fragrance Oils Set for Aromatherapy - Fine-Quality Versatile Essential Oils for Diffusers for Home, Humidifiers, DIY Crafts & Projects - Candle Scents for Candle Making, Gift Set
features: 6 Premium Fragrance Oils Set: Enjoy a handpicked collection of NexGen’s White Musk, Parma Violet, Orange Blossom, Japanese Magnolia, Freesia, and Honeysuckle essential oil set. Each 15ml bottle is filled with long-lasting fragrance to elevate your space or DIY creations.

Perfect for Candle Making & Wax Melts: Craft beautifully scented candles with these oils that blend smoothly into soy or paraffin wax. Designed for a strong scent throw, our candle scents for candle making fill your home with cozy, inviting aromas.

Works with All Diffusers & Humidifiers: Add a few drops of our diffuser oil to your diffuser or humidifier and transform any room into a calming retreat. Create the perfect atmosphere for relaxation, meditation, or restful sleep with our essential oils for diffusers for home.

Versatile for DIY Crafts & Home Projects: Beyond using these fragrance oils for candle making, our aromatherapy oils are ideal for soap making, bath bombs, lotions, perfumes, and even slime projects. A fun, creative way to personalize gifts or home essentials.

Ready-to-Gift Packaging for Every Occasion: Beautifully presented with a brand message card and customized packaging, this fragrance oils for diffuser makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, holidays, housewarmings, or anyone who loves DIY and home fragrance.
description: Product description Looking for a way to refresh your space with long-lasting fragrance while also enjoying fun DIY projects? This NexGen’s Essential Oils Set is just what you need—perfect for candle making, oil diffusers, burners, humidifiers, and more. Each bottle contains pure essential oil crafted for both aromatherapy and creative use. From adding a few drops to your essential oil humidifier kit or oil diffuser to making DIY soaps, lotions, or wax melts, these natural essential oils offer endless possibilities for your home. Use them as candle fragrance oil for soy wax, scented oils for burners, or even fragrance oil for wax melts to enjoy rich, soothing scents in every corner. Not just for relaxation—these oils are also versatile enough for practical uses like essential oils for cleaning, leaving your home smelling fresh and clean while adding a touch of natural fragrance. With six delightful scents (White Musk, Parma Violet, Orange Blossom, Japanese Magnolia, Freesia, Honeysuckle), this set makes every moment feel special. Whether you want a calming aromatherapy oil session, uplifting home fragrance, or to craft unique DIY gifts, this candle fragrance oil set has you covered. Packaged in a ready-to-gift box with a message card, it’s a thoughtful present for anyone who loves essential oils, aromatherapy, and creative projects. Bring freshness, creativity, and fragrance into your life—with one versatile oil set that does it all. Directions See product description and bullet points for usage instructions. Safety Warning Always dilute essential oils before use. Keep away from eyes and skin. Avoid contact with clothing and fabrics. Do not ingest. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Use in a well-ventilated area. Do not use near heat sources or open flames. Store in a cool, dry place away from light. See more
